title: CollectionSchedule
description: The DSNY collection schedule for a specific address — refuse, recycling, and organics/composting days, plus the responsible DSNY district and any holiday adjustments. This is what the /assets/dsny/forms/collection-schedule React form returns today by calling the undocumented dsnypublic.nyc.gov/dsny/api/geocoder/DSNYCollection backend; there is no owned, documented, agent-native contract for it. Frequencies reconcile with the DSNY Frequencies dataset (rv63-53db).

refuseDays.description: Days of the week refuse (trash) is collected.

bulkNote.description: Guidance for large/bulk item set-out for this address.

suspended.description: Whether collection is currently suspended (e.g. snow operations / holiday).

nextHoliday.description: Next holiday that adjusts this schedule, if any.
